summary:
The reviewed literature shows no indication that left atrial appendage occlusion devices affect echocardiography or electrocardiogram parameters. Consequently, based on existing evidence, these devices do not alter routine cardiac diagnostics in patients with atrial fibrillation.  

\boxed{B}

Consequently, based on existing evidence, these devices do not alter routine cardiac diagnostics in patients with atrial fibrillation.
